form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth after a quick start, behind Official View at this track over 1635m in a 0-1 WIN on March 3 at $11. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing third behind Wongalea Meg at Leeton over 1758m in a NR 34 to 35 on March 10 at $34. From a low draw is expected to measure up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running rounding the home turn.
Tightened for room entering the first turn when Lord Percy Hung in.
Held up for clear running in the early stages of the home straight.
Inconvenienced as a result of French Street breaking gait.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 1760m after showing early speed at Junee beaten 35 m by William Aitch (2:12.10) in 3yo MAIDEN on March 31 at $81. At the run before 6th (Fr3) over 1720m at Young, beaten 35 m by Smooth Chakra (2:05.20) in 0-1 WIN on March 24 at $14. Finds the right race this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 1760m after showing early speed at Junee beaten 35 m by William Aitch (2:12.10) in 3yo MAIDEN on March 31 at $81. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Negotiating the first turn became unbalanced and broke stride.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr3) over 1760m at Junee, at the bell was 6th-13.6 beaten 12 m by One Stunin Melody (2:14.10) in 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $81. Before that, 4th (Sr2) over 1720m at Young was 5th-10.1 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Stars Abroad (2:09.80) in 0-1 WIN on March 24 at $61. Nicely drawn and expected to run a bold race.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced passing the 400m when The Kid Billy was yielded ground.
Checked leaving the 1600m when Mudslinger Monty broke gait.

form.formComment: Backing up quickly since being well beaten Junee over 1760m, 6 days ago before that was well back in the run when 7th (Fr5) over 2270m at Riverina Paceway, beaten 24 m by Alwaysthewildest (2:50.20) in MAIDEN on March 20 at $71. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced behind My Ultimate Bruno when that runner was giving ground.
Tired over the concluding stages to be beaten in excess of 59m.
Out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr6) over 1720m at Young, beaten 25 m by Tulhurst Iris (2:05.80) in 2yo MAIDEN on March 24 at $19. Will be right in the thick of things.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved last start with a good run despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr6) over 1720m at Young, beaten 25 m by Tulhurst Iris (2:05.80) in 2yo MAIDEN on March 24 at $19. Will be right in the thick of things.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: When negotiating the first turn broke stride and shifted out.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr4) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway was 6th-8.3 at the bell, beaten 10 m by William Aitch (2:07.40) in MAIDEN on March 27 at $31. Two runs back 5th (Fr4) over 2270m after racing wide at Riverina Paceway, at the bell was 5th-8.8 beaten 12 m by Alwaysthewildest (2:50.20) in MAIDEN on March 20 at $13. Hard to have on those efforts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait free of interference entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at Canberra over 1770m 3yo+ MAIDEN on March 9. Last time out 8th (Sr1) over 1760m at Junee was 7th-13.8 at the bell, beaten 13 m by Official View (2:12.20) in 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $21. Bold showing expected if at her best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after straightening shifted out momentarily tightening Eyes Off Tiger.
Led the event failed to run on to finish in seventh position beaten 25.3m.
Broke stride in the middle stages of the score up on the second occasion.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 5th (Sr1) over 2270m at Riverina Paceway, beaten 40 m by My Ultimate Franco (2:42.50) in NR up to 48 on March 20 at $126. Before that 8th (Fr1) over 1760m at Junee beaten 15 m by Bettes Blue Violet (2:12.60) in NR up to 50 M on March 17 at $41. This looks a far sterner test.

form.formComment: Finished third at his last two starts since resuming from a spell. Last outing was beaten 3.5 metres behind Official View at Junee over 1760m 0-1 WIN on March 31. Among the top chances again.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr2) over 1760m at Junee was 9th-18.2 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Official View (2:12.20) in 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $41. At the start before 5th (Fr2) over 1760m at Junee beaten 15 m by Magic Matteo (2:10.80) in NR 41 to 46 on March 17 at $18. Will be in the finish if he finds his best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced approaching the 300m when My Guarantee was giving ground.
